ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active and available for sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "product_variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product variation the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount applied to the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the order item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the order item belongs to */,
  "product_variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product variation the order item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Customer preferences */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Loyalty status of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_name" TEXT /* Name of the discount */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "reward_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for earning rewards */,
  "points_per_dollar" REAL /* Points earned per dollar spent */,
  "expiration_period" INTEGER /* Expiration period for loyalty points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program_members" (
  "loyalty_program_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program member */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who is a member of the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer is a member of */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Points redeemed by the customer */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the loyalty points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_members_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_members_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipment belongs to */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
